skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A certain county has an area of 5.80 square miles. What is the area, in square yards, of this county? (1 mile = 1,760 yards)
rationale: 1 square mile = (1,760 yards)² = 3,097,600 square yards. Therefore 5.80 × 3,097,600 = 17,966,080 square yards. Choice (a) is correct.
